title: Telescope for Astronomy Adults&Kids Beginners, 180X, 80mm Aperture 600mm Astronomical Refractor Telescope with Moon Filter&Tripod&Phone Adapter&Bag, Portable Travel Telescopes for Ground&Moon Viewing
features: Professional Astronomical Telescope: This UncleHu telescope for adults and kids has an 80mm objective lens and 600mm focal length with fully multi-coated optics for enhanced light transmission and minimized light loss. Whether observing lunar craters or distant landscapes, it provides an exceptionally bright, high-contrast’╝īwide field of view with outstanding color accuracy.

Powerful Refractor Telescope: Equipped with 10mm and 25mm eyepieces and a 3x Barlow lens, the telescope provides variable magnification from 24x to 180x. The 45┬░ zenith mirror provides an upright image for comfortable viewing, while the 5x24 finder scope with crosshairs helps the telescope to point at the target faster. Thus, it is suitable for both daytime terrestrial viewing (landscapes/wildlife) and nighttime sky watching (the Moon/stars).

Premium Accessories: The aluminum tripod adjusts from 56cm to 125cm with 360┬░ panning and 180┬░ tilting for flexible viewing and smooth tracking. The moon filter reduces glare while enhancing contrast for crisp lunar details. The phone adapter connects your phone to the telescope to easily record and share interesting images and videos. The accessory tray keeps your accessories organized to avoid loss during use.

Beginner-Friendly & Portable: Weighing just 2.5kg, this lightweight telescope comes with detailed paper instructions for easy, tool-free assembly to foster exploration confidence. The included carry bag offers convenient storage and transportation, making it perfect for backyard stargazing or camping trips. A fantastic educational gift for kids, adults and families!

Reliable Quality & Support: Every telescope undergoes strict quality inspection. If you need any assistance, our support team will do our best to resolve promptly. Begin your exploration adventure now!
